title: gymnadenia conopsea subsp. intermedia
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea subsp. intermedia, also known as the intermediate fragrant orchid, is a subspecies of orchid found in Europe, particularly in the mountainous regions of the Alps. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gymnadenia conopsea subsp. intermedia include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, often used to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory and skin conditions.
